Enable read access for users to their AI.name: Enable read access for users to their AI usage logs
Enable read access for users to their AI.using:
(
      EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM organizations
        WHERE organizations.id = "ai_usage_logs"."organization_id"
        AND organizations.user_id = auth.uid()
      )
    )

Enable read access for authenticated use.name: Enable read access for authenticated users to customers
Enable read access for authenticated users to subscriptions
Enable read access for authenticated use.using:
(
      EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM organizations
        WHERE organizations.id = "subscriptions"."organization_id"
        AND organizations.user_id = auth.uid()
      )
    )

Enable read access for users to their ar.name: Enable read access for users to their architecture file results
Enable read access for users to their ar.using:
(
      EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM pr_reviews
        JOIN organizations ON organizations.id = pr_reviews.organization_id
        WHERE pr_reviews.id = "pr_architecture_file_results"."pr_review_id"
        AND organizations.user_id = auth.uid()
      )
    )
